title: Monday.com advertisements and our announcements
excerpt:

posts.author: Larryr20 (Larry Rabinowitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

One of the newer features in Monday is the ability to put a banner at the top of the boards, it is referred to as “Announcements”. We use this all the time to remind users to fill boards out completely, company announcements etc.

Monday is letting people know about their “Live Webinar…” and it appears on top of our announcement and requires the end user to click the x to dismiss it. Many people see it and ignore it as it doesnt apply to them but they dont bother clicking the x to get to our own in-house message.

Anyone know how I can shut these off? There are only a few this webinar may apply to and an email is enough. It defeats the purpose of the announcement feature of the end user is required to dismiss unwanted messages.

Thanks all!!
